title: VOLLEYBALL GAME TECHNIQUES AND TACTICS: THEORETICAL AND PRACTICAL BASES
author: Tajibayev Axmadjon Bobomurodovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article examines the technical and tactical aspects of volleyball from a scientific and theoretical perspective. It highlights the role of individual technical skills and team tactical coordination in improving game performance. Additionally, modern strategies and their impact on match outcomes are analyzed.
steps_raw: This article examines the technical and tactical aspects of volleyball from a scientific and theoretical perspective. It highlights the role of individual technical skills and team tactical coordination in improving game performance. Additionally, modern strategies and their impact on match outcomes are analyzed.
